message:
fix(host): use is_none_or for idiomatic option filtering and fix async test annotation

Two small host crate fixes:

- admin_state.rs: Replace `map_or(true, |f| ...)` with `is_none_or(|f| ...)`
  in the event journal query filter. This is the idiomatic Rust pattern for
  "pass if None, otherwise check the predicate", and avoids the double
  negation that map_or introduces.

- resilience.rs: Convert `timeout_only_failure_predicate_trips_on_timeout`
  from a synchronous `#[test]` to an async `#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]`.
  The test body exercises async circuit breaker behavior and needs the
  runtime executor to be present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
